snippet: We have decided to end our collaboration with Thorne. The good news is that we have already developed replacements for many of the Thorne products that are now being discontinued. ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏
subject: Important notice! We are discontinuing Thorne | Greatlife.eu 💚
body:
[Greatlife](https://www.greatlife.eu)

 

[Supplements](https://www.greatlife.eu/supplements)    •    [Brands](https://www.greatlife.eu/brands)    •    [Blog](https://www.greatlife.eu/blog)

 

[Greatlife](https://www.greatlife.eu/brands/greatlife)

[Greatlife](https://www.greatlife.eu/brands/greatlife)

[Greatlife](https://www.greatlife.eu/brands/greatlife)

 

IMPORTANT NOTICE

 

Why we are discontinuing Thorne

You may already have noticed that we have chosen to end our collaboration with Thorne, a brand that has been with us since Greatlife first started. The background is as follows:

Over the years, Thorne has been sold to various financial companies. Most recently, things appear not to have gone very well, and the distributor for Thorne has now abruptly ended its relationship with the company because the brand has unfortunately begun to compromise too much on quality, with hidden ingredients, lower-quality raw materials, and unclear origin. This previously outstanding brand is sadly no longer what it once was.

We will therefore sell the remaining stock we currently have, which consists of earlier batches that still meet good quality standards. After that, we will no longer bring in additional products from Thorne. Greatlife should be associated with the absolute highest quality, and unfortunately Thorne no longer fits that standard as it stands today.

The good news is that we have already developed replacements for many of the Thorne products that are now being removed from our assortment. Because we are extremely meticulous about quality and develop the best products available, you will not need to compromise—quite the opposite. In many cases, you will receive alternatives that surpass the level Thorne previously maintained. In addition, our supplements come in dark glass jars instead of white plastic. These allow less light exposure and contain no microplastics or endocrine-disrupting substances.

[Shop Greatlife’s own products today](https://www.greatlife.eu/brands/greatlife)

 

 

[Greatlife](https://www.greatlife.eu/brands/greatlife)

Replacements
 
Undecylenic Acid (SF722) from Thorne → replaced by [Undecylenic Acid from Greatlife](https://www.greatlife.eu/undecylenic-acid-greatlife)
Zinc from Thorne → replaced by [Zinc from Greatlife](https://www.greatlife.eu/zinc-picolinate-greatlife)
Theanine from Thorne → replaced by [Sleep Plus+ from Greatlife](https://www.greatlife.eu/sleep-plus-greatlife)
Potassium from Thorne → replaced by [Potassium from Greatlife](https://www.greatlife.eu/potassium-citrate-greatlife)
Phosphatidyl Choline from Thorne → partially replaced by [Citicoline from Greatlife](https://www.greatlife.eu/citicoline-greatlife)
Perfusia-SR from Thorne → replaced by [L-Arginine from Greatlife](https://www.greatlife.eu/l-arginine-greatlife)
Niacinamide from Thorne → replaced by Vitamin B3 (Niacin, Quali®-B) from Greatlife. In stock at the end of March.
Methylcobalamin from Thorne → replaced by [Methylcobalamin from Greatlife](https://www.greatlife.eu/vitamin-b12-metylkobalamin-greatlife)
L-Lysine from Thorne → replaced by [L-Lysine from Greatlife](https://www.greatlife.eu/lysine-greatlife)
Calcium from Thorne → replaced by [Calcium from Greatlife](https://www.greatlife.eu/calcium-citrate-greatlife)
Rhodiola rosea from Thorne → replaced by [Adaptogens Plus+ from Greatlife](https://www.greatlife.eu/adaptogens-plus-greatlife)
Vitamin D from Thorne → replaced by [Vitamin D3+K2 from Greatlife](https://www.greatlife.eu/vitamin-d3-2000-greatlife)

 

[Undecylenic Acid](https://www.greatlife.eu/undecylenic-acid-greatlife)

[Sleep Plus+](https://www.greatlife.eu/sleep-plus-greatlife)

Undecylenic Acid (250 mg/cap)
– one of our best supplements for combating fungal issues
 
Undecylenic acid from Greatlife helps counteract fungal overgrowth, such as Candida, in the gastrointestinal tract. Undecylenic acid has traditionally been used to promote a healthy microbial environment and may support gut function during imbalances. 

Sleep Plus+
– for sleep and falling asleep
 
Sleep Plus+ from Greatlife is a carefully crafted supplement designed to support relaxation, falling asleep, and the body's natural sleep processes. The formula contains selected amino acids, minerals, and high-quality vitamin B6.

 

[Buy now](https://www.greatlife.eu/undecylenic-acid-greatlife)

 

[Buy now](https://www.greatlife.eu/sleep-plus-greatlife)

 

[Iron Plus+](https://www.greatlife.eu/iron-greatlife)

[Living Silica™](https://www.greatlife.eu/living-silica-greatlife)

Iron Plus+
– supports the normal formation of red blood cells
 
Iron Plus+ from Greatlife is a top-quality iron supplement designed to support healthy blood formation, oxygen transport, and energy production. Iron Plus+ contains iron in bisglycinate form for high absorption and gentle tolerance on the stomach.

Living Silica™
– supports the body's collagen metabolism
 
Living Silica™ Acacia Gum-OSA from Greatlife is a pure and well-researched silica in the form of orthosilicic acid (OSA), the biologically active form that the body can naturally absorb. Silica plays an important role in the body's connective tissue and collagen.

 

[Buy now](https://www.greatlife.eu/iron-greatlife)

 

[Buy now](https://www.greatlife.eu/living-silica-greatlife)

 

 

QUALITY THAT MAKES A DIFFERENCE

 

What our customers say

"I appreciate Greatlife’s products, which are carefully tested and do not contain harmful or unnecessary additives. In addition, detailed and reliable information is provided for each product. A pleasant and easy-to-use website as well. And fast delivery! I’m a returning customer with high standards for quality." /Ingela

"Thank you so incredibly much for your super-fast and detailed reply. It’s the clearest and most helpful information I have ever received about supplements and fertility! You make it so easy to understand and prioritize—many thanks for all your time and expertise." /Emma

"You are amazing and phenomenal. I feel so safe shopping with you, and I can truly say that no other online store offers this level of customer service and support. Thank you!" /Johanna

[Shop Greatlife’s own products today](https://www.greatlife.eu/brands/greatlife)
